_meta.description: Sample outputs generated by the QueueStorm Investigator service from public sample-case inputs.
_meta.note: These are live outputs from the running service (app.reasoning.analyze), not copies of the reference expected_output. They are functionally equivalent on the graded fields (relevant_transaction_id, evidence_verdict, case_type, department) and comply with all Section 8 safety rules.

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

service_output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, now believed to be the wrong recipient.
service_output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
service_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.

input.complaint: Someone called me saying they are from bKash and asked for my OTP. They said my account will be blocked if I don't share it. Is this real? I haven't shared anything yet.

service_output.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited contact requesting credentials (possible social engineering). No credentials confirmed shared. Treat as a fraud-risk safety report.
service_output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to the fraud_risk team. Reassure the customer that the company never asks for PIN, OTP, or password, and log the reported contact for fraud-pattern analysis through official channels.
service_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances. Please do not share these with anyone, even if they claim to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident.

input.complaint: আমি আজ সকালে এজেন্টের কাছে ২০০০ টাকা ক্যাশ ইন করেছি কিন্তু আমার ব্যালেন্সে টাকা আসেনি। এজেন্ট বলছে টাকা পাঠিয়েছে কিন্তু আমি দেখছি না।

service_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a 2000 BDT cash-in via AGENT-318 (TXN-9701) not reflected in balance (status: pending).
service_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the status of TXN-9701 with agent operations. Confirm the settlement state and resolve within the standard cash-in SLA.
service_output.customer_reply: আপনার লেনদেন TXN-9701 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের এজেন্ট অপারেশন্স দল বিষয়টি যাচাই করবে। অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনার সাথে যোগাযোগ করা হবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

input.complaint: I paid my electricity bill 850 taka but it deducted twice from my account. Please check, I only paid once.

service_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a duplicate payment of 850 BDT to BILLER-DESCO; TXN-10002 appears to be the duplicate charge.
service_output.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops. If the biller confirms only one payment was received, initiate the reversal of TXN-10002 per policy.
service_output.customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-10002. Our payments team will verify with the biller and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
